channel.title: Button on Built by Nikhil
channel.description: Recent content in Button on Built by Nikhil

item.title: Day 3: Button Input — Making the Arduino Listen
item.description: Day 3 of Learn Coding with Arduino — connect a push button, read it with digitalRead, and use your first if/else to turn on an LED only when pressed.

item.title: Day 7: The Easier Button — INPUT_PULLUP
item.description: Day 7 of Learn Coding with Arduino — simplify your button circuit using the Arduino’s built-in pull-up. One resistor less, and learn how to toggle an LED with each press.

item.title: Day 10: Project — Smart Night Light
item.description: Day 10 of Learn Coding with Arduino — build a smart night light that turns on automatically when it gets dark, with a manual override button.
